Actions.Text: REFERRED TO HOUSING, CONSTRUCTION AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT
REFERRED TO HOUSING, CONSTRUCTION AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT

Title: Establishes tenant eligibility for certain housing accommodations
Summary: Prohibits persons whose income is greater than one hundred twenty-five percent of the area median income from occupying certain housing accommodations.
LawCode: Amd §10, Emerg Ten Prot Act of 1974; amd §10, Emerg Hous Rent Cont L; add §26-418, amd §26-512, NYC Ad Cd
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the emergency tenant protection act of nineteen seventy-four, the emergency housing rent control law and the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to establishing tenant eligibility for certain housing accommodations
